'''jahosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hidoku|hidoku]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-h-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hidoku|hidoku]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jahosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæhesheth|jæhesheth]] || [[word:jæheshej|jæheshej]] || [[word:jæheshesh|jæheshesh]] || [[word:jæheshe|jæheshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jahohoshoth|jahohoshoth]] || [[word:jahohoshoj|jahohoshoj]] || [[word:jahohoshosh|jahohoshosh]] || [[word:jahohosho|jahohosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jahoshoth|jahoshoth]] || [[word:jahoshoj|jahoshoj]] || [[word:jahoshosh|jahoshosh]] || [[word:jahosho|jahosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jahofshoth|jahofshoth]] || [[word:jahofshoj|jahofshoj]] || [[word:jahofshosh|jahofshosh]] || [[word:jahofshof|jahofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jahoshotho|jahoshotho]] || [[word:jahoshojo|jahoshojo]] || [[word:jahoshosho|jahoshosho]] || [[word:jahoshoko|jahoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jahoshoth|jahoshoth]] || [[word:jahoshoj|jahoshoj]] || [[word:jahoshosh|jahoshosh]] || [[word:jahosho|jahosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jahoshothol|jahoshothol]] || [[word:jahoshojol|jahoshojol]] || [[word:jahoshoshol|jahoshoshol]] || [[word:jahoshokol|jahoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jahoshothotho|jahoshothotho]] || [[word:jahoshojojo|jahoshojojo]] || [[word:jahoshoshosho|jahoshoshosho]] || [[word:jahoshoko|jahoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jahoshothon|jahoshothon]] || [[word:jahoshojon|jahoshojon]] || [[word:jahoshoshon|jahoshoshon]] || [[word:jahoshokon|jahoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jahoshothoro|jahoshothoro]] || [[word:jahoshojoro|jahoshojoro]] || [[word:jahoshoshoro|jahoshoshoro]] || [[word:jahoshokoro|jahoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
